INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get challange codes list from BRE ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if challenge_codes retured from BRE ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Challenge Codes are returned from BRE ---
--- Create Auto Activate Challenges if they do not exist or if cancelled--ALTVE-220 ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check AutoOptIn status for the challengeCode ---

Values.value: --IsAutoOptIn is TRUE -- Member challenge creation Start, if not exist---

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Step 1 check if challenge exists in CANCELLED status --ALTVE-220 ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- cancelled Challenge does not exist in DB ,check for active challenge---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: ---Challenge does not exist in DB ,activate challenge---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-941 Check if policyEffFromDate is greater than current date ---
--- Check Challenge is created in Response Doc ---

Values.value: Member Challenge created for member: %AutoActivateChallengeRequest/entityNumber% and challengeCode is %challengeCodes%

MAP.COMMENT: concate E to exception error code

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: --- Challenge Exists in DB Do Nothing ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --Cancelled challenge exist in DB, perform reinstatmeALTVE-220--

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get Challenge Periods from DB that are NOTACHIEVED ---

Values.value: --- Get Challenge Periods that are NOTACHIEVED ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get Challenge Periods from DB that are CANCELLED ---

Values.value: --- Get Challenge Periods that are CANCELLED ---

MAP.COMMENT: -- drop results and create a list of all challenge periods ---

Values.value: Challenge Period updated for PeriodId:%challengePeriods/challengePeriodId% Set Active Period to INPROGRESS

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get All Challenge Periods from DB ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Sort periods in desc order of period No. to find last period ---
--- Map startDate and endDate of last period ---
--- initialize newStartDate of Current Period & period No. ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: get the start and end date based on type

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Member Challenge ToDate Updated to 31-12-9999 Date ---
